name: Felipe Esparza
bio: Felipe Esparza is a Mexican-born American stand-up comedian and actor who began performing in 1994 and won the NBC competition Last Comic Standing in 2010. His comedy draws on his upbringing in the Boyle Heights neighborhood of Los Angeles and his bilingual Mexican-American identity. He has released specials for Showtime, HBO, and Netflix, including bilingual English and Spanish versions, and hosts the podcast Whats Up Fool?.

timeline.ev: Releases first special, They're Not Gonna Laugh at You
Releases bilingual Netflix specials Bad Decisions and Malas Decisiones

accolades: Released a bilingual Netflix special in separate English and Spanish versions
Host of the long-running podcast Whats Up Fool?

specials.t: They're Not Gonna Laugh at You
